# xcodeMetrics.ProductData.MetricCategories.Metrics.Unit

**Object**

A unit of measurement and its display name.

## Declaration

```swift
object xcodeMetrics.ProductData.MetricCategories.Metrics.Unit
```

## Objects

- **xcodeMetrics.ProductData.MetricCategories.Metrics.Datasets**: A set of data containing metric values for each app version, filtered by percentile and device type.
- **xcodeMetrics.ProductData.MetricCategories.Metrics.GoalKeys**: A classification of a metrics value and the lower- and upper-bound values that qualify a metrics value for the classification.
